name: Kotopoulo Kapanici
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
1 tbsp To 2 tbsp Chopped fresh parsley or cilantro
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 4
1. Sprinkle the chicken generously with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil and butter in a large casserole pan over moderate heat.
3. Add chicken to the pan and fry until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add onion and garlic to the pan and gently fry for about 5 minutes until soft.
6. Return chicken to the pan, add wine, then tomatoes, tomato paste, cinnamon stick, cloves, allspice berries, and water; stir well.
7. Simmer mixture for about 45 - 60 minutes or until chicken is tender.
8. Pound spices in mortar and mix into casserole with remaining liquid.
9. Add artichokes (if using) about 10 minutes before end of cooking time to heat through.
10. Taste and adjust seasoning, stir in parsley or cilantro.
11. Serve immediately.
